Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: ARCHIVY SYNC VORGAENGE PUSH (exakt) - synchronisiert Vertraege_vorgaenge, die ueber Vertraege.Vertrag_ID verknuepft sind und deren Vertrag Archivy_sync = x hat.

Value.Calculation: MBS("FM.SQL.Execute"; ""; "SELECT \"Vertrag_ID\" as \"vertrag_id\", \"Vertragseigentümer\" as \"owner\" FROM \"" & $$FM_VERTRAEGE_TABELLE & "\" WHERE \"Archivy_sync\" = 'x' OR \"Archivy_sync\" = 'X'")

MBS("FM.SQL.Execute"; ""; "SELECT \"Vertrag_ID\" as \"vertrag_id\", \"Vertragseigentümer\" as \"owner\" FROM \"" & $$FM_VERTRAEGE_TABELLE & "\" WHERE \"Archivy_sync\" = 'x' OR \"Archivy_sync\" = 'X'")
Case ( not IsEmpty ( $mk ) and not IsEmpty ( $mk_owner ) ; List ( $owner_map ; $mk & "|" & $mk_owner ) ; $owner_map )

If ( Left ( $sql ; 5 ) = "[MBS]" ; "[]" ; Let([ j = MBS("FM.SQL.JSONRecords"; $sql; "vorgang_id" & ¶ & "vertrag" & ¶ & "vorgang_art" & ¶ & "art_der_erledigung" & ¶ & "beschreibung" & ¶ & "datum" & ¶ & "frist" & ¶ & "datei" & ¶ & "erledigung" & ¶ & "nachfrist" & ¶ & "erledigt" & ¶ & "ersteller" & ¶ & "verantwortlicher" & ¶ & "sb" & ¶ & "bvh" & ¶ & "ba" & ¶ & "gew" & ¶ & "an" & ¶ & "a_nr" & ¶ & "kunde" & ¶ & "we" & ¶ & "grundstueck" & ¶ & "makler" & ¶ & "interessent")) ]; Let([ t = TrimAll ( j ; 1 ; 1 ) ] ; If ( not IsEmpty ( t ) and ( Left ( t ; 2 ) = "[]" or Left ( t ; 2 ) = "[{" ) ; t ; "[]" ) ) )

Let([ t = TrimAll ( $json ; 1 ; 1 ) ] ; Case ( IsEmpty ( $key ) ; "CONFIG_ERROR: $$SUPABASE_KEY / $$SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY fehlt" ; not IsEmpty ( $sql_err ) ; "SQL_ERROR: " & $sql_err ; IsEmpty ( t ) or Left ( t ; 2 ) = "[]" or Left ( t ; 2 ) = "[{" ; "" ; Left ( "JSON_PARSE_ERROR: " & t ; 200 ) ) )

Let([ v = $vertrag_key ; map = "¶" & $owner_map ; p = Position ( map ; "¶" & v & "|" ; 1 ; 1 ) ] ; Case ( p > 0 ; Let([ s = p + 1 + Length ( v ) + 1 ; e = Position ( map & "¶" ; "¶" ; s ; 1 ) ] ; Middle ( map ; s ; e - s ) ) ; "" ) )

Case ( Left ( $sql_owner ; 5 ) = "[MBS]" or IsEmpty ( $sql_owner ) ; "" ; Lower ( Substitute ( TrimAll ( GetAsText ( MBS("FM.SQL.Field"; $sql_owner; 0; 0 ) ) ; 1 ; 1 ) ; "+" ; "-" ; " " ; "-" ; "&" ; "-" ; "/" ; "-" ; "_" ; "-" ) ) )

"VORGAENGE: markiert=" & $marked_count & " verarbeitet=" & $anzahl & " ok=" & $ok & " skip=" & $skip & " fehler=" & If(IsEmpty($fehler);"keine";Left($fehler;500)) & " | ver=" & $script_version & " | ts=" & $ts_iso & " | leer_besch=" & $leer_besch & " | leer_besch_raw=" & $leer_besch_raw & " | push_all=" & $push_all & Case ( not IsEmpty ( $row_owner_dbg ) ; " | row_owner_dbg=" & $row_owner_dbg ; "" ) & Case ( not IsEmpty ( $owner_calc_dbg ) ; " | owner_calc_dbg=" & $owner_calc_dbg ; "" ) & " | url=" & $$SUPABASE_URL & " | inhaber=" & $$INHABER_ID & " | tabelle=" & $$FM_VORGAENGE_TABELLE
